title: Found the Light of My Life
summary: Your eyes sparkled, and my heart pounded. In a moment that was deeply romantic and beautifully simple, we stood hand in hand and became one — for richer or poorer, in sickness and in health.

title: 新生活
summary: 在记忆深处找回两个人的幸福时光，处处是温馨和欢畅。脸上藏不住的笑，每天一起种花拔草，一起设计添置家当。用不完的时间，洒在小区的散步路上，寂静无事的夜里，卷在书房沙发上一起追剧酣畅。我有一次看完电影痛苦流涕，无法自抑，因为想到将来或许我也会失忆，不能忍受失去的痛苦或直面陌生的现实。还是看看老照片吧，它们让我踏实，提醒我珍惜和你在一起的日子。

title: Our First Child
summary: With the coming of Richard, I also witnessed the metamorphosis of you from a petite lady to a brave mother.  You endured so much pain to give his birth, and never stopped giving all you love and strength to nurture our son. Oh man, I am blessed!
milestones: Meaning of his English name: Richard the King!
Second meaning of his name: Live a rich life
Meaning of his Chinese name: Be smart and unique

title: 三口之家
summary: 游戏已经改变，宇宙中心变得明确。早起晚睡跟着转，一切都很正确。听从老婆的指导，跟随老婆的脚步。从奶爸做起，认认真真努力学习，要做一个合格的爸爸，称职的老公。我自以为已使出洪荒之力，谁看到妈妈日复一日的坚持，幽暗灯光下疲倦的脸庞。亲爱的老婆，我怎么一直这样粗心，没能在意你的青春正在悄然流淌。
milestones: 从此多了一个生日，永记心底

title: On the Move
summary: The world got bigger and we travelled farther. No matter where we went, Mom would always ensure we got 100% prepared. If travelled by car, there would be plenty of food and snack on the trip. If stayed overnight, then the right pieces of clothes and towers (and everything) would fill up the suit cases. You are so organized, my love. Did I tell you - I am spoiled 🙂
milestones: We saw the volcano, and Richard said: 'Trees fell down, burned to death!'

title: 中国行
summary: 每次回国都让人兴奋，然而有去就有还，离别时不仅感叹相聚的短暂。我看到你哭了，回头送别爸妈的泪目中说不尽的留恋和不舍。年纪大了，看一眼少一眼。仔细算来，剩下和父母一起的日子，累计起来不过月余。龙应台说过，养大孩子的过程就是看着他们的背影，渐行渐远。当我们回头一望时，看到的何尝不是背影。回国去看看吧，每年都回家走走吧。爸妈会越走越远，孩子也终将远去，唯念我可以陪着你一起走过这一生。

title: The Magic Moment
summary: Life brings occasional surprises, yet most days are ordinary and plain. I wish I could be a funnier, more energetic and more interesting husband, someone who could make you laugh every single day. Your smiles are my favorite sight, whether we are at home, out exploring, or simply spending quiet moments together.

title: 有缘人
summary: 我相信缘份。如果黛玉和宝玉有前世姻缘，那你我今世夫妻也必是命中注定。为什么你历经了人海浮沉而最终选择了我？为什么我久候良缘而不遇，偏偏电话找到了你？所有的等待，都只是为了在恰好的时间遇见有缘人。
milestones: 你我有缘人，修得同船渡。
老鼠上了老鼠船，上去容易下来难。
人海之中，找到了你，一切变得有意义。

title: Living in Harmony
summary: More than anything, I want harmony and peace in our marriage. I left behind verbal violence and wanted to build a relationship where all of us feel respected and loved. I know I haven't always communicated well when we disagreed, and I am committed to learning better ways.  My old habit was to withdraw and keep quiet during heated arguments, but it didn't work every time and created more distance between us.  I will change, and please help me make it better.
milestones: It's okay to pause but the important part is agreeing to return to the conversation
Repairing quickly after conflict can prevent resentment from building

title: 你是我的跳跳虎
summary: 和你在一起，我更像那只熊，懒懒散散，健忘憨厚。而你每天忙忙碌碌，东擦擦西扫扫，虽然不是跳来跳去，但也是一刻不停。你是我们的动力火车，引领着我们不断前进，为这个家为我们的孩子付出更多的努力，做更好的自己。我总佩服你有好点子，你说我却不爱动脑筋，一拨一动。你是人情世故的好手，那些棘手繁琐的你来我往，在你面前都变得轻松自然。好厉害👍

title: Up
summary: Sometimes I wish we could live in the house featured in the movie 'Up' so that we can travel to many places easily and comfortably.  We both love road trips and driving RVs around to explore places near and far.  This will be an upgrade to RV since we can do that without leaving our house. I enjoy travelling with you, it is always relaxed and not rushed.  Plus you take good care of planning and packing everything for me 😂
milestones: Favorate road trip - Great Smoky Mountain
Places want to visit next - Yellowstone National Park
Place want to visit again - Banff National Park

title: 万里长城
summary: 万里长城永不倒，要不倒是有条件的。坚固的地基 + 梯形结构 + 砖石包砌 + 糯米灰浆 + 良好排水 + 持续维护 我坚信我们的婚姻像坚固的长城，两个人个性好，有爱心（地基），相似的价值观（结构），独立人格（砖石包砌），深爱的孩子们（糯米灰浆）。我反省到，排水（克服焦虑）和维护（互相谦让和支持）将是持续努力的重点。你我一起添砖加瓦，让长城更长。我爱你。
milestones: 你看我们脸型越来越像

title: Our New Member
summary: Welcome home, my baby! Your mother and I are so thrilled to be your parents.  We will love you and give you the best we can, no matter how naughty you become, no matter how struggled you feel about mathematics, and no matter who you choose to be...
milestones: We restarted the clock and all over again
Bottle feeding, diaper changes, and sleep losses
Because we wanted, there is no regret

title: 众星捧月
summary: 独身子女长大的我总觉得家里至少应该有两个孩子。爸爸妈妈的爱能量实在太多，一个孩子受不了的，要分享着用才好。谁知道分是分了，但爸妈的产出也跟着涨，每个孩子得到的爱一点不少。多了的是双份的焦虑和烦恼，秃掉的头发和大叫。好了好了，快点吃饭快点睡觉！
milestones: 一只哈巴狗，坐在大门口，
眼睛黑黝黝，想吃肉骨头。
“祝你生日快乐，祝你生日快乐，快点鼓掌、鼓掌！”😂😂😂

title: A Year the World Stopped
summary: The world locked down, and the streets became deserted. All noises and bustle vanished and replaced by the songs of birds that seemed louder than ever. Stepped outside our door, we became the only spectators witnessing a vast and tranquil landscape.
milestones: We learned to work and study from home
We started online grocery shopping and wiping down everything we brought in
We found Dana Peak Park (our favorite) where we could escape and breathe some fresh air once a week

title: 走过新冠
summary: 新冠病毒进入第二年，带来的痛苦与日俱生。与社会隔绝的抑郁和全世界死亡数据带来的焦虑，不断挑战我们的忍受力。老婆你承受压力最大，一直提心吊胆，默默为全家的安全保驾护航，付出了沉重的代价，每次想到这就悔之莫及😢 我们竭尽全力保持生活的规律，周末四处寻找无人区放风，释放压抑的心情。这极大地安抚了每个人的心灵，让我们变得坚强，走过一段艰辛的岁月。老婆，没有你不行啊！
milestones: 我们住进集装箱改造的小木屋

title: Walk Out of the Shadow
summary: The whole family caught COVID virus at last.  Whatever... It could not stop us anymore.  We wanted to go back to the normal life (in safe way).  We talked about going further to places never visited before. Your exceptional trip planning and organization skills proved irreplaceable and every moment of laughter, joy, and unforgettable memories we shared was because of you.  Thank you!
milestones: Also visited the park near to me.

title: 浴火重生
summary: 当电话里得知你确诊癌症时，我瞬间五雷轰顶。慌慌张张回到家里，和你泪眼相对。接下来的三个月里，夜不能寐，和你一起备受煎熬。所幸很快能够在最好的医院约上手术，且进行顺利。身边的朋友们给予了无比的关怀，远渡重洋只身前来的亲人也安抚了我们的焦虑。然而一波三折，一个月不到又做了第二次手术，痛在你身上，也疼在我心里。看着你病弱的身躯，我誓言挑起家庭的重担。短短两个月就让我真正体会到了当好一个家庭主妇的不易。不幸中的大幸，你逃过了化疗的摧残。你的坚强和韧性让你很快恢复了起来。年末来到疗伤圣地，在寂静的山谷和茫茫雪原中和你一起燃起新的生命力。就如手术前我们谈心时提到的，我无法想象没有你的日子里会何等寂寞，我不能没有你，最爱的老婆。
milestones: 七月二十三日：得知噩耗
九月： 肿囊切除手术
十月： 胆囊切除手术

title: Grand Adventures
summary: We chased sunrises across temples, markets, and unfamiliar cities. Travel reminded us that curiosity is a habit that keeps a marriage young.

title: Slowing Down
summary: We said no to more things and yes to quiet. Books, long walks, and simple meals became the luxury we had earned.

title: Twenty Years
summary: Two decades of choosing each other, day after day. We gather the memories, the hard and the golden, and look ahead with gratitude.
